name: University Management
description: Comprehensive university management system — manage students, courses, enrollments, and grades with academic calendars, transcripts, and department oversight.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchStudents
capabilities.description: Search for students by name, ID, or program

capabilities.name: createEnrollment
capabilities.description: Enroll a student in a course

capabilities.name: getCourse
capabilities.description: Get course details with enrolled students and schedule

capabilities.name: updateGrade
capabilities.description: Update a student's grade for a course

capabilities.name: deleteEnrollment
capabilities.description: Drop a student from a course

capabilities.name: getStudent
capabilities.description: Get student profile with transcript and enrollments

capabilities.name: searchCourses
capabilities.description: Search courses by name, code, department, or instructor

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read university data including students, courses, and grades

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update students, courses, enrollments, and grades

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete students, courses, enrollments, and grade records

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full university administration including academic policies

events.description: New course added to the catalog
